title: AusMT build report v1.0
description: Structured per-survey build metadata emitted alongside build_provenance.json: what each survey built, its structured survey-scoped warnings, the canonical-conditioning notes aggregated BY DISTINCT NOTE with station counts (the same aggregation the survey-level build log prints), the C18 cache counters, and per-survey wall time. Public build metadata for the (planned) curator serve-state UI.

engine_commit.description: short HEAD of the engine repo (mirrors build.json)

source_commit.description: short HEAD of the ausmt-surveys checkout, or null for --raw / non-git --surveys (mirrors build.json)

build_id.description: the opaque C12 build id (mirrors build.json)

pipeline_version.description: the engine distribution version (mirrors build_provenance.json's pipeline_version)

stations_dropped.description: structured per-station drops; populated by the C25 convention gates (a gate FAIL names the gate, the angles and the fix)

conditioning.description: one entry per DISTINCT canonical-conditioning note, ordered by first appearance

frame.description: C25 frame/convention notes (derotation records, convention WARNs, insufficient-data notes), same aggregation shape as conditioning; optional for pre-C25 reports

digest.description: first 12 hex of the survey.yaml digest, or '' for --raw

conditioning_entry.description: a distinct conditioning note carried by `count` of the survey's note-carrying stations. At most one of `stations` (the small carrier set) / `except` (the small absentee complement) is non-null; both null => neither side is short enough to enumerate and the count alone tells the story.
